calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-01-2022 Vacated

Notice And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Responses To Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jun-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
HEARING RE: DEFENDANT RICHARD CONWAY's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Responses To Request For Production Of Documents.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion to compel is granted. Within five days of this order, plaintiff will serve on defendant written and verified answers to the RPDs, without objections, and produce all of the requested documents. Within five days of this order, plaintiff will pay to defendant sanctions in the amount of $4,680 (amount is as to all three discovery motions).

Single order signed as to all three discovery motions.

Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey Wohl; Clerk Ateesh Datt; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Responses To Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jun-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT RICHARD CONWAY's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Responses To Form Interrogatories.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion to compel is granted. Within five days of this order, serve on defendant written and verified answers to the Form Interrogatories, without objections. Within five days of this order, plaintiff will pay to defendant sanctions in the amount of $4,680 (amount is as to all three discovery motion).

Single order signed as to all three discovery motions.

Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey Wohl; Clerk Ateesh Datt; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of And Motion By Defendant Richard Conway To
Deem Requests For Admission, Set One, To Plaintiff Admitted;
Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $2,595;
Off Calendar Jun-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT RICHARD CONWAY's Motion By Defendant Richard Conway To Deem Requests For Admission, Set One, To Plaintiff Admitted; Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $2,595.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion to deem matters admitted is granted. The matters set forth in the RFAs are deemed admitted by plaintiff.

Within five days of this order, plaintiff will pay to defendant sanctions in the amount of $4,680 (amount is as to all three discovery motion).

Single order signed as to all three discovery motions.

Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey Wohl; Clerk Ateesh Datt; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
